<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (frontend)
- [ ] `python -m compileall app` passes (backend)
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or `*.db` files are included
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or config changed
